content.en:
"Ancestor has lived for too many years, he is one of the oldest Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Source Clan, he has already reached one of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and he has also created one of the many reincarnation supreme divine powers, he naturally wants to continue to break through. "

"Yes, the ancestor has no fear of falling, even if he is dead, he is dead, for him, to promote to a higher realm and open up a new path is what he desires the most. "

"If the Ancestor of the Fox is dead, it will be a good thing for us, but what if he succeeds? A Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened nine times or broken the boundary of the Nine Origin Realms has failed to attack a higher realm, but every time he fails, he has accumulated experience once, maybe he will succeed this time!"

"If he succeeds, our reincarnation celestial clan will be in trouble, and we may be destroyed by him. "

The reincarnation celestial clan's Origin Upper Realm overlords are also worried about this problem, in case the Ancestor Ancestor breaks through successfully, it will definitely far surpass the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and when the entire Reincarnation Heavenly Clan joins forces, it is estimated that they will not be the opponents of the other party.

Therefore, every Origin Upper Realm Overlord who attacked the realm above the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, they would be worried.

If possible, it's best to disrupt the opponent's impact so that the opponent loses in the process.

But.

The Reincarnation Source Clan will definitely do their best to protect the Ancestor, so that it can break through with peace of mind, and it will not be easy to destroy.

......

Reincarnation of the source family.

A group of Origin Upper Realm Overlords who have broken the boundaries of the Nine Origins are arranged.

In the depths of a void, a majestic white figure sat cross-legged.

He is the ancestor.

Wow!

A figure descended, and it was another Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Nine Origin Boundaries, Jaw Ancestor!

Jaw Ancestor said to Fox Ancestor: "Ancestor Fox, do you really want to impact a higher realm, it's too dangerous?

The ancestor smiled slightly: "I don't know that there is no breakthrough, but there must be a breakthrough, maybe I am the one who opens up the path of a higher realm! Besides, the Origin Ancestor of the Land of Eternity has broken through in half a step, even if he dies soon, but the rules laid out before his death cannot be broken even if we join forces." It's just a half-step breakthrough, and it's about to die, and the means arranged are so terrifying. If you really step into that realm, your strength will be many times stronger than now, and you can pinch your current self to death. "

"But are you sure?"

Jaw Zu asked.

"No!" Ancestor shook his head, "I've lived too long, I've long lived enough, impacting the higher realm is my only goal, even if I fail, I will pass on my experience to you before I die." "

Jaw Zu knew that he couldn't stop the Ancestor, so he had no choice but to give up.

Then, he left the place without disturbing the ancestor.

Outside.

Yizu and the others who broke the boundaries of the Nine Origins Upper Realm overlords appeared.

"Ancestor still decided to hit a higher realm, right?"

Yizu asked.

"Yes!" Jaws nodded.

"Then arrange it, arrange a large number of magic circles, plus our protection, even if the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Evil Clan join forces, they will be able to resist for a period of time, and they will not let them disturb the Ancestor!"

"Well, let's do it then!"

Jaw ancestral road.

Soon.

The Origin Upper Realm Overlords who had broken the boundaries of the Nine Origin Realms began to get busy.

Time passed, and the Reincarnation Source Clan was gradually arranged, and the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan were also ready to make a move.

And they contacted the reincarnation tribe and wanted the reincarnation tribe to do the same.

However, one of the Origin Dao Ancestors of the Reincarnation Sect who broke the boundary of the nine times said: "We Reincarnation Sect don't want to offend the Reincarnation Origin Clan, if you Reincarnation Heavenly Clan try to stop it, then it's up to you to stop it, we won't do it anyway!"

No matter how the reincarnation celestial clan persuades, they can't say that they can't move the reincarnation clan.

"Forget it, the reincarnation clan thinks that they are immortal and immortal, so they don't want to get involved. Hehe, if you really let the ancestor break through, you can seal them all with your hand, and if you don't move, you can also destroy the origin mark they left in the origin of the reincarnation domain, and then they will have to die!"

However, even if the Reincarnation Clan is unwilling to make a move, they still have to stop it as much as possible.

After all, in the past, the nine awakenings of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan's Origin Upper Realm Overlord went to impact the better realm, and the Reincarnation Origin Clan also came to stop it, so they naturally had to retaliate back, otherwise wouldn't they admit it!

......

"A Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Reincarnation Origin Clan is actually going to attack the realm above the Nine Origin Realms Origin Upper Realm Overlord?"

Ye Tian was also extremely surprised to know this information.

Once the breakthrough fails, it will definitely die!

Of course, he was also curious and wanted to go over and have a look.

"If I go over as a member of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, I will definitely be killed, so make a copy of the body of a Reincarnation Source Clan, and then get closer to the past to see, even if I can't get close, I can also get some information in time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He began to copy the copy body of a reincarnation source family, and copied it close to the reincarnation source domain, so that once the copy was made, he could directly go to the reincarnation source domain!

It didn't take long for a reincarnation source clan to copy the body, and it was still a fallen reincarnation source clan, and with a little camouflage of appearance and breath, it could be passed.

Such an identity will definitely not stand up to investigation, but during this period, the reincarnation source clan is mainly targeting the reincarnation celestial clan and the reincarnation clan, and they will not check the identity of the members of the reincarnation source clan, they don't have this idle time.

Moreover.

He was just approaching the area to see the excitement and doing nothing else, so it was unlikely that he would be spotted.

......

Reincarnation source domain.

Ye Tian's reincarnation source clan copied the body and came here, and then caught a few slave races, learned about the information, and then sneaked into a city to inquire about the situation, and after inquiring again and again, he finally understood the specific situation.

According to the information he obtained, it was the ancestor of the reincarnation source clan who wanted to impact the higher realm, and the news also spread, and the retreat place was located in the reincarnation source domain of the feather avoidance city.

Now.

The entire city was emptied, and even the countless nearby territories were emptied, and a large number of magic circles were arranged there to protect it, not allowing any living creature to approach, not even a member of the reincarnation source clan.

However, they also projected the picture there for the members of the Reincarnation Origin Clan to know.

Of course, the picture is definitely not clear, and it is impossible to project the specific figure of the ancestor, but only the picture of that area.

The breakthrough process will be very large, just look at the projection of an area.

After Ye Tian understood the situation, he stayed in a city to watch the projection.
